items.title: More Electric Aircraft Market Report 2024, by System (Propulsion, Airframe), Component, Platform (Narrow Body, Wide Body, Regional Jet, Fighter Jet), Application and End Use - Forecast to 2029
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The more electric aircraft market is projected to grow from $5.56 billion in 2024 to $8.01 billion by 2029, driven by the development of high-density battery solutions, increasing use of electric technology, and technological advancements. Key players include Safran, Honeywell, RTX, and General Electric.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Honeywell is mentioned as one of the key players in the more electric aircraft market, indicating its involvement and potential growth opportunities in this industry.
RTX (Raytheon Technologies) is mentioned as one of the key players in the more electric aircraft market, indicating its involvement and potential growth opportunities in this industry.
